title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, served via Virgo Network for high-throughput performance. The video compares these ASICs against NVIDIA GPUs and analyzes how scaling strategies affect token economics and LLM serving at scale.
